/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/X TODAY'S PRELIMINARY HEARING VACATED,/X DISTRICT ATTORNEY AMENDS COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 2 - 243,25PC, MISDEMEANOR,/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:002/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/DISM3/
